targets.query: from(bucket: "vxg_tests") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and r._field == "power_dbm")
from(bucket: "vxg_tests") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and r._field == "pass") |> group(columns: ["unit_id"]) |> count()
from(bucket: "vxg_tests") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "unit_id", "_field", "_value"]) |> tail(n: 50)
